/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_ability.dir/tests/test_ability.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ability.dir/src/ability/AbilityDef.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ability.dir/src/ability/AbilitySystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ability.dir/src/ability/CooldownSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ability.dir/src/ability/EffectSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_ability.dir/src/ability/StatusEffectSystem.cpp.o -o test_ability  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglm.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libspdlog.1.17.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libfmt.12.1.0.dylib
